verses.1: A Song; a Psalm of the sons of Korah. Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised In the city of our God, His holy mountain.
verses.2: Beautiful in elevation, the joy of the whole earth, Is Mount Zion in the far north, The city of the great King.
verses.3: In its palaces, God has made Himself known as a stronghold.
verses.4: For, behold, the kings arrived, They passed by together.
verses.5: They saw it, then they were amazed; They were terrified, they fled in a hurry.
verses.6: Panic seized them there, Anguish, as that of a woman in childbirth.
verses.7: With the east wind You smash the ships of Tarshish.
verses.8: Just as we have heard, so have we seen In the city of the LORD of armies, in the city of our God; God will establish her forever. Selah
verses.9: We have thought over Your goodness, God, In the midst of Your temple.
verses.10: As is Your name, God, So is Your praise to the ends of the earth; Your right hand is full of righteousness.
verses.11: Mount Zion shall be glad, The daughters of Judah shall rejoice Because of Your judgments.
verses.12: Walk around Zion and encircle her; Count her towers;
verses.13: Consider her ramparts; Go through her palaces, So that you may tell of her to the next generation.
verses.14: For such is God, Our God forever and ever; He will lead us until death.
